title: transmutation of life on xp
description:
The mod allows you to change your health hearts to xp using magic
ps. I am not responsible for any deaths in Minecraft
body:
This innovative mod adds a feature that allows you to convert health hearts into experience points (XP) by interacting with a magic block.

When the player clicks on a special block, part of his health will be converted into experience points. This is especially useful in situations where the player has excess health but lacks experience points. Converting hearts into XP allows you to use excess health to gain valuable experience points that can be useful for upgrading skills, spells or items.

This mod provides a new dimension of strategy in the game, encouraging players to consciously manage their health and experience points. Additionally, it introduces an element of risk because it requires the player to decide whether to convert health into XP at a given moment or to save it for later use if necessary.

Install the "transmutation" mod and discover new possibilities for exploring and developing your character in your Minecraft adventure!

crafting is very simple hehe, shown in the picture below


![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88d8be269f76c243ea0eca769d93d1b555f4468f.png)
